rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §22.003, which governs school district employee personal leave programs. No overlap exists.
quote: A state minimum personal leave program consisting of five days per year personal leave with no limit on accumulation and transferable among districts shall be provided for school district employees.
_note: No conflict detected; the two provisions address unrelated subject matter (property tax exemptions vs. school employee leave).
